ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Current subscription status */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "release" TEXT /* Release information (e.g., album name) */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Reference to the artist associated with the song */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the song belongs to */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary genre of the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the song contains explicit content */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the song has been played */,
  "skip_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the song has been skipped */,
  "repeat_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the song has been replayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the artist */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist debuted */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "social_media_link" TEXT /* Link to the artist's social media profile */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening history record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who listened to the song */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song being listened to */,
  "listen_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the song was listened to by the user */,
  "listened_at" TEXT /* Date and time the song was listened to */,
  "skip_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song was skipped by the user */,
  "repeat_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song was replayed by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Privacy status of the playlist */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the playlist has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record in the playlist songs */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist containing the song */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song in the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Pop, Rock) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song-genre association */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song associated with the genre */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the song */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the genre is the primary genre of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_genres_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "track_count" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary genre of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "song_id" TEXT /* ID of the song being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user regarding the song */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "user_playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-playlist interaction */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user interacting with the playlist */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist being interacted with */,
  "interactions" INTEGER /* Count of interactions the user has with the playlist */,
  "last_played_at" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was last played by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "action_url" TEXT /* URL to take action based on the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user with the subscription */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan (e.g., Free, Premium) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription ends */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Renewal status of the subscription */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
